title: Ava Loveless
short_description: A debut short Visual Novel set in Gothic/Steampunk Britain, with three story branches, meaningful choices, and a few grizzly twists.
description: Ava Loveless is a debut short Visual Novel set in the United Kingdom under a Gothic/Steampunk aesthetic. Taking inspiration from works by John Carpenter, H.P Lovecraft and H.G Welles. The story contains three unique story branches with choices to make and traps to avoid. Intended as a work of casual fun with a few grizzly twists and turns to hopefully leave a positive and entertained impression.
